title: The Chimera Effect
overview: After her father's death, Samantha Antrum's (Ashley Nichols) life begins to unravel as she and her boyfriend Norman Delaney (MTV's "The Hills" Justin Bobby) discover previously hidden family secrets which threatens to consume and destroy their lives.
